name: paper-ops
description: Academic paper search router and workflow skill for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Search academic paper sources and save normalized result sets.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex integration for the paper-ops workflow. Routes prompts into search, pipeline, tracker, and batch modes while keeping markdown and JSON artifacts aligned.
defaultPrompt: paper-ops search "systematic review" AND "retrieval augmented generation"
